title: cyrtandra areolata var. areolata
intro: Cyrtandra areolata var. areolata, also known as the 'Mountain Cyrtandra', is a rare and endemic plant species found in Papua New Guinea. This plant is a member of the Gesneriaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyrtandra areolata var. areolata include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cyrtandra areolata var. areolata is often used in decoctions and infusions, typically by boiling the leaves in water and consuming the resulting liquid as a tea.
